name: water_day_all_day_01
description: Anonymized school newsletter announcing Water Day as date-only all-day events on two dates (production regression: extraction must stay all_day=true; materialization policy is tested outside LLM evals)

provenance.anonymization_notes: School name, child names, addresses, and message IDs replaced. Date wording and all-day structure preserved.

input.subject: This Week at Riverside Elementary — Water Day & Early Release
input.snippet: Reminder: Water Day is Monday, July 27 and Tuesday, July 28...
input.body_text:
RIVERSIDE ELEMENTARY SCHOOL
Family Newsletter — Week of July 20

Dear Families,

A few important calendar notes for the coming week:

WATER DAY
Monday, July 27 and Tuesday, July 28 are Water Days for all grades.
Students may bring a towel and a change of clothes. There is no specific start or end time — Water Day is an all-day campus activity on each of those dates.

EARLY RELEASE
Friday, July 31 is a regular early-release day at 12:30 PM for teacher planning.

Please mark your calendars.

Thank you,
Riverside Elementary Office
office@riverside-elementary.example.edu

notes: LLM must keep Water Day as all_day=true. Timed conversion is a user preference applied after extraction.
